title: Coveted U.S. Nuclear Deal Is a Coup for Saudi Crown Prince
summary_full: Saudi Arabia has for years sought a deal to obtain American nuclear technology. The agreement, signed on Wednesday, could deepen U.S.-Saudi ties for decades to come.
summary_public: Saudi Arabia has for years sought a deal to obtain American nuclear technology. The agreement, signed on Wednesday, could deepen U.S.-Saudi ties for decades to come.

SA.evidence: U.S. Nuclear Deal Is a Coup for Saudi Crown Prince
